reasoning_model_1: Model 1 delivers the text 'Mm, this dish tastes really good!' with high content accuracy and natural prosody. However, regarding the specific paralinguistic instruction 'with a smack of the lips', the model fails to generate a distinct, non-linguistic lip-smacking sound. reasoning_model_2: Model 2 generates the audio with a clear attempt at the requested feature. model_comparison: The user explicitly requested a 'smack of the lips' as a non-linguistic vocalization. Model 1 provided a natural reading of the text with appropriate emotional tone (enjoyment) but failed to generate the actual sound effect of a lip smack, merely acting out the word 'Mm'. Model 2, conversely, successfully inserted a distinct non-linguistic lip-smacking sound at the beginning of the audio (0:00-0:01), satisfying the specific feature control constraint. While Model 1 might be smoother vocally, Model 2 is the only one that strictly followed the paralinguistic command.
